evidence.text: Documented diagnosis of non-valvular atrial fibrillation confirmed by electrocardiogram and cardiology consultation.
Documented stroke risk score calculated at 4 using the standard atrial fibrillation stroke risk scale.
Renal function assessed; creatinine clearance and eGFR result recorded 2 months before initiation.
Current medications reviewed; member confirmed free of concurrent therapeutic anticoagulant agents.
Documented diagnosis of non-valvular atrial fibrillation confirmed by electrocardiogram and cardiology consultation.
Documented stroke risk score calculated at 1 using the standard atrial fibrillation stroke risk scale.
Renal function assessed; creatinine clearance and eGFR result recorded 3 months before initiation.
Current medications reviewed; member confirmed free of concurrent therapeutic anticoagulant agents.
Documented diagnosis of non-valvular atrial fibrillation confirmed by electrocardiogram and cardiology consultation.
Documented stroke risk score calculated at 3 using the standard atrial fibrillation stroke risk scale.
Current medications reviewed; member confirmed free of concurrent therapeutic anticoagulant agents.
